response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, TDD discipline, and distributed systems experience at scale, they fall dramatically short on the minimum C++ requirement with only ~6 months of production C++ experience at National Instruments versus the required 8 years. Their 17-year career trajectory has been primarily web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than infrastructure and compute platforms, and there is no evidence of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering.
strengths: Proven expertise in software craftsmanship, TDD methodology, and testing culture with high-impact shipped products
Direct experience building distributed systems handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Strong mentoring and teaching background through workshops, code dojos, and multiple staff-level roles
concerns: Fails minimum C++ requirement: ~6 months to 1-2 years of production experience vs. required 8 years
No demonstrated production cloud architecture leadership or formal cloud/DevOps engineering mentorship
Career progression focused on web and full-stack technologies, not infrastructure and compute platform engineering
